welcome_back_yesterday: Great to see you again! You were here yesterday.
welcome_back_days: Welcome back! It's been {{days}} days since your last visit.
welcome_back_less_than_month: So glad you're back! It's been {{days}} days.
welcome_back_long_time: Welcome back! We've missed you! It's been {{days}} days.
subtitle: Finally, we are getting married!
rsvpIntro:
We'd love to know if you can make it!
Please let us know in time so we can make sure everything is perfect for you.
rsvpClosedMessage: Thank you to everyone who let us know they were coming — it meant the world to us!
welcome: We are pleased to invite you to celebrate with us one of the most important days of our lives.
welcomePast: Thank you so much for celebrating with us on one of the most important days of our lives.
familyHint: This is an adults-only event. We hope you understand.
stayHint: We recommend Hotel San Camilo — a short drive from the venue.
questionsBody: If you have any questions, feel free to call us, write to us, or check <qaLink>the questions page</qaLink>.

underConstruction.title: More details Coming Soon!
underConstruction.message: We're so excited to celebrate with you! Some details, are still being finalized. Stay tuned for {{featureList}} and more.—we can't wait to share everything with you soon!

ourStoryBody: Love at first sight is the quiet miracle of a single moment, when one glance ignites a feeling too deep for words. Time seems to pause, hearts lean closer, and the soul recognizes something it has been waiting for all along.
